languages.text: {n}В зарковских легендах полярная шапка мира надолго стала местом проклятым и зловещим. Северные ветра теперь доносят потусторонний смех и шепот нездешних голосов. Но жертва не была напрасной — Погонщицы попросту не могли устоять перед приманкой и большая часть их популяции покинула обитаемые регионы мира.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}В зарковских легендах полярная шапка мира надолго стала местом проклятым и зловещим. Северные ветра теперь доносят потусторонний смех и шепот нездешних голосов. Но жертва не была напрасной — Погонщицы попросту не могли устоять перед приманкой и большая часть их популяции покинула обитаемые регионы мира.{/n}

languages.text: {n}In Zarkovian legend, the world's polar ice cap became a cursed and ominous place for a long time after. The northern winds now carry with them eerie laughter and the whispers of otherwordly voices. Yet the sacrifice was not in vain — the Drovers simply could not resist the lure and the greater part of their population abandoned the habitable regions of the world.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}В зарковских легендах полярная шапка мира надолго стала местом проклятым и зловещим. Северные ветра теперь доносят потусторонний смех и шепот нездешних голосов. Но жертва не была напрасной — Погонщицы попросту не могли устоять перед приманкой и большая часть их популяции покинула обитаемые регионы мира.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}In Zarkovian legend, the world's polar ice cap long remained a cursed and ominous place. The northern winds now carry with them unearthly laughter and the whispers of alien voices. Yet the sacrifice was not in vain. The Drovers could simply not resist the lure, and the greater part of their population abandoned the inhabited regions of the world.{/n}

{n}In Zarkovian legend, the world's polar ice cap became a cursed and ominous place for a long time after. The northern winds now carry with them eerie laughter and the whispers of otherwordly voices. Yet the sacrifice was not in vain — the Drovers simply could not resist the lure and the greater part of their population abandoned the habitable regions of the world.{/n}

{n}Zarkovian legends say that the polar cap of the world has long been a cursed and malevolent place. Now otherworldly laughter and whispers of strange voices can be heard there, carried on the north winds. But this sacrifice was not in vain — the Drovers were helpless to resist the bait. Let the enemy devour the enemy.{/n}

{n}In Zarkovian legend, the world's polar ice cap long remained a cursed and ominous place. The northern winds now carry with them unearthly laughter and the whispers of alien voices. Yet the sacrifice was not in vain. The Drovers could simply not resist the lure, and the greater part of their population abandoned the inhabited regions of the world.{/n}

{n}In Zarkovian legend, the world's polar ice cap became a cursed and ominous place for a long time after. The northern winds now carry with them eerie laughter and the whispers of otherwordly voices. Yet the sacrifice was not in vain — the Drovers simply could not resist the lure and the greater part of their population abandoned the habitable regions of the world.{/n}

languages.text: {n}ザルコビアンの伝説によると、世界の極冠は古くから呪われた悪意に満ちた場所であった。今では異界の笑い声や奇妙な声のささやきが北風に乗って聞こえる。しかしこの犠牲は無駄ではなかった。放牧民は餌に抵抗できなかった。敵は敵を食らう。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Zarkovian legends say that the polar cap of the world has long been a cursed and malevolent place. Now otherworldly laughter and whispers of strange voices can be heard there, carried on the north winds. But this sacrifice was not in vain — the Drovers were helpless to resist the bait. Let the enemy devour the enemy.{/n}

traits.locale_text: ザルコビアンの伝説によると、世界の極冠は古くから呪われた悪意に満ちた場所であった。今では異界の笑い声や奇妙な声のささやきが北風に乗って聞こえる。しかしこの犠牲は無駄ではなかった。放牧民は餌に抵抗できなかった。敵は敵を食らう。

languages.text: {n}En las leyendas zarkovianas, los polos del planeta se convirtieron en un lugar maldito y siniestro durante mucho tiempo. Los vientos del norte ahora traían con ellos risas escalofriantes y susurros de voces sobrenaturales. Aun así, el sacrificio no fue en vano: los Pastores fueron incapaces de resistirse al cebo y la mayor parte de su población abandonó las regiones habitables del mundo.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}In Zarkovian legend, the world's polar ice cap became a cursed and ominous place for a long time after. The northern winds now carry with them eerie laughter and the whispers of otherwordly voices. Yet the sacrifice was not in vain — the Drovers simply could not resist the lure and the greater part of their population abandoned the habitable regions of the world.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}En las leyendas zarkovianas, los polos del planeta se convirtieron en un lugar maldito y siniestro durante mucho tiempo. Los vientos del norte ahora traían con ellos risas escalofriantes y susurros de voces sobrenaturales. Aun así, el sacrificio no fue en vano: los Pastores fueron incapaces de resistirse al cebo y la mayor parte de su población abandonó las regiones habitables del mundo.{/n}

languages.text: {n}在此后的漫长岁月中，扎尔科夫的传说始终将世界北境的极地冰原描绘成一片受诅咒的凶险之地。凛冽的寒风中回荡着令人不寒而栗的笑声，夹杂着来自异界的呢喃低语。但这场献祭绝非毫无意义——拒生花根本无法抗拒那股诱惑，族群中的绝大多数都离开了这个世界的宜居地带。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}In Zarkovian legend, the world's polar ice cap became a cursed and ominous place for a long time after. The northern winds now carry with them eerie laughter and the whispers of otherwordly voices. Yet the sacrifice was not in vain — the Drovers simply could not resist the lure and the greater part of their population abandoned the habitable regions of the world.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}在此后的漫长岁月中，扎尔科夫的传说始终将世界北境的极地冰原描绘成一片受诅咒的凶险之地。凛冽的寒风中回荡着令人不寒而栗的笑声，夹杂着来自异界的呢喃低语。但这场献祭绝非毫无意义——拒生花根本无法抗拒那股诱惑，族群中的绝大多数都离开了这个世界的宜居地带。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Zarkovianischen Legenden zufolge waren die vereisten Polkappen der Welt danach lange Zeit ein verfluchter und unheilvoller Ort. Die nördlichen Winde sind seitdem von gespenstischem Gelächter und dem Flüstern andersweltlicher Stimmen erfüllt. Aber das Opfer war nicht umsonst ... die Treiber konnten dem Köder nicht widerstehen und der Großteil ihrer Population verließ die bewohnbaren Regionen der Welt.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}In Zarkovian legend, the world's polar ice cap became a cursed and ominous place for a long time after. The northern winds now carry with them eerie laughter and the whispers of otherwordly voices. Yet the sacrifice was not in vain — the Drovers simply could not resist the lure and the greater part of their population abandoned the habitable regions of the world.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Zarkovianischen Legenden zufolge waren die vereisten Polkappen der Welt danach lange Zeit ein verfluchter und unheilvoller Ort. Die nördlichen Winde sind seitdem von gespenstischem Gelächter und dem Flüstern andersweltlicher Stimmen erfüllt. Aber das Opfer war nicht umsonst ... die Treiber konnten dem Köder nicht widerstehen und der Großteil ihrer Population verließ die bewohnbaren Regionen der Welt.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Zarkov efsanesinde dünyanın kutup buzulu, uzun süre lanetli ve uğursuz bir yer hâline geldi. Kuzey rüzgârları artık tüyler ürpertici kahkahalar ve öteki dünyadan seslerin fısıltılarını taşıyor. Ancak bu fedakârlık boşuna olmadı. Çobanlar, basitçe yemin cazibesine karşı koyamadılar ve nüfuslarının büyük kısmı dünyanın yaşanabilir bölgelerini terk etti.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}In Zarkovian legend, the world's polar ice cap became a cursed and ominous place for a long time after. The northern winds now carry with them eerie laughter and the whispers of otherwordly voices. Yet the sacrifice was not in vain — the Drovers simply could not resist the lure and the greater part of their population abandoned the habitable regions of the world.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Zarkov efsanesinde dünyanın kutup buzulu, uzun süre lanetli ve uğursuz bir yer hâline geldi. Kuzey rüzgârları artık tüyler ürpertici kahkahalar ve öteki dünyadan seslerin fısıltılarını taşıyor. Ancak bu fedakârlık boşuna olmadı. Çobanlar, basitçe yemin cazibesine karşı koyamadılar ve nüfuslarının büyük kısmı dünyanın yaşanabilir bölgelerini terk etti.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Dans les légendes zarkoviennes, la calotte polaire devint suite à cela un endroit maudit pendant fort longtemps, les vents glaciaux propageant rires effrayants et murmures fantomatiques. Ce sacrifice ne fut néanmoins pas vain : les Chasseurs ayant mordu à l'hameçon, la majorité d'entre eux déserta les régions peuplées du monde.{/n}
